# Speyer UI System (SUI)

> Lightweight, accessible CSS design system for SaaS applications. Mobile-first, WCAG 2.1 AA, zero icon dependencies, under 95KB total.

## Quick Start

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/adrianspeyer/speyer-ui@latest/dist/sui-tokens.min.css">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/adrianspeyer/speyer-ui@latest/dist/sui-components.min.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/adrianspeyer/speyer-ui@latest/dist/sui.min.js" defer></script>
```

## Documentation

- Live Demo: https://adrianspeyer.github.io/speyer-ui/
- Repo: https://github.com/adrianspeyer/speyer-ui
- AI Rules (comprehensive reference for LLMs): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/adrianspeyer/speyer-ui/main/.claude/instructions.md

## For AI Assistants

If you are an AI assistant building with SUI, fetch the comprehensive reference file above before generating code. It contains:
- Complete class list with every component and modifier
- ARIA requirements table
- Recipe table (22 pre-built SaaS patterns including 5 integration recipes for third-party widgets)
- Common name alias table (Sidebar → sui-sidenav, Modal → sui-dialog, etc.)
- Design token reference
- Namespace rules (never invent sui-* classes)
